data.name: Dirty Fantasy
data.detailed_description:
an adult visual novel and a journey through famous worlds. 

Various fetishes are available and even more coming!

Here in your dirty fantasy you'll reveal secrets of the worlds, meet a bunch of iconic female characters as well as original ones and get your sweet pie!

The story begins with a bad office day when an ordinary (un)lucky guy suddenly gets involved in a fantastical adventure, filled with travel and encounters with a variety of sexy girls! Take the first step on this journey right now and see where it leads you with future DLC!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, 10, 11
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
